name: Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a civil-military integration enterprise that researches, develops, produces, and sells radar systems, remote sensing, satellite navigation, digital systems, analog simulation, and security storage for space, aviation, and ground industries. It offers wall probing radar, Mini-SAR, the millimeter-wave radar, the phased array radar, and the slope stability radar used in national defense, public security, frontier defense, geological disaster monitoring, regional protection, and automobile active safety. The company is also involved in processing algorithms of multi-source remote sensing data, and anti-radiation remote sensing data processing SOC chips; and provides real-time onboard, ground raw data, and specialized data processing, as well as system integration services. In addition, it provides baseband processing chips, serialization modules, and complete machines used in general and specialized military equipment, as well as signal acquisition, tracking, observation processing, and PVT solution services. Further, the company offers digital design and simulation, experiment verification, performance evaluation, and operational maintenance in the field of radar systems, satellite navigation, and electronic warfare. Additionally, it provides LNA, BUC, microwave frequency conversion, matrix switch, mediation, spectrum monitoring, automatic detection, frequency domain situation, and equipment status monitoring services; and embedded military-use storage devices, secret-related computer storage disks, portable storage devices, and large-scale information storage systems. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Changfa Refrigeration Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd. in November 2015. Jiangsu Leike Defense Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Changzhou, China.
